title: AURORA, Official Merchandise, 61615, The Gruffalo Palm Pals, Soft Toy, Brown
features: Step into the heartwarming world of The Gruffalo with our enchanting The Gruffalo Palm Pals Soft Toy, inspired by the best-selling children's picture book The Gruffalo written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. This is a brown-coloured cute and cuddly plush, filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

100% Official Licensed Merchandise. Aurora World brings the magical world of The Gruffalo to life with our range of The Gruffalo soft toys, featuring beloved characters such as Mouse, Fox, Owl and Snake. Suitable from Birth. The Gruffalo Palm Pals measures 13cm.

This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for Christmas, a birthday or as a general gift. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable, Brown-coloured soft toy which has a super soft plush body, with felt accent materials for his tusks, teeth and fingers. This Gruffalo plush has his trademark green wart, purple spikes, black tongue and orange eyes, making it an ideal gift choice for The Gruffalo fans of all ages.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. The Gruffalo Palm Pals is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing The Gruffalo Palm Pals - a soft and cuddly toy based on the beloved character from the best-selling children's picture book, The Gruffalo, written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. This brown-coloured plush toy is filled with beans that fit perfectly in your palm, making it great for cuddling. Palm Pals are made with high-quality materials and are extremely touchable. The Gruffalo Palm Pals is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials as well. This soft toy is suitable for all ages and measures 13cm. Whether you're looking for a gift for Christmas, a birthday, or any other occasion, The Gruffalo Palm Pals is an excellent choice. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable, Brown-coloured soft toy which has a super soft plush body, with felt accent materials for his tusks, teeth and fingers. This Gruffalo plush has his trademark green wart, purple spikes, black tongue and orange eyes, making it an ideal gift choice for The Gruffalo fans of all ages. As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on The Gruffalo Palm Pals and experience the joy of this beloved character. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
